items.title: [正面] Lovecraftian Slay the Spire with excellent story a...
items.summary:
Lovecraftian Slay the Spire with excellent story and super addicting gameplay. I've been playing this F2P for the 2 months and I often boot it up just to play "one more level" and end up staying up until 5am.

Good:
+ Banned in China (blood and mature themes)
+ 10/10 gameplay similar to Slay the Spire
+ Doesn't hold back on difficulty
+ Great art and excellent music
+ Small devteam not willing to compromise on their vision
+ Generous for a gacha - I have all of the standard chars and 10 banner chars after one month F2P
+ Cross-progression with mobile
+ Devs are active on Discord

Bad:
- No real tutorial in-game, you'd just have to play Slay the Spire first
- It's a gacha
- Dupes are required later on, with breakpoints at 4, 8, and up to 16 copies
- Takes around 2 months as F2P to reach the account level needed to unlock all features. Before this point you might be timegated by lack of stats/dupes to get past Chapter 8 in the campaign.
- Machine-translated chapters after chapter 3 (they're working on the human translation)

items.summary: this is a GREAT game if you're a gooner
